data.title: Tree Island Steel Provides Update on Annual General Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 17, 2026, Tree Island Steel Ltd. disclosed an update regarding its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders. The meeting, initially set for 9:00 a.m. PT, will now commence at 11:30 a.m. PT while maintaining the original date. Tree Island Steel Ltd. is listed as TSX: TSL.

data.title: NVIDIA introduces NemoClaw Stack for secure local AI agent deployment on DGX Spark with Nemotron 120B model.
data.description: NVIDIA has recently unveiled the NemoClaw reference stack, an open-source platform that empowers developers to operate sandboxed AI agents on DGX Spark hardware using the Nemotron 120B model. This innovation allows developers to efficiently run AI agents locally with a secure environment.

data.title: SK Life Science Labs to Present New Preclinical Data on Targeted Protein Degradation at AACR Annual Meeting 2026
data.description: In 2026, SK Life Science Labs had three posters accepted at AACR, showcasing their targeted protein degradation pipeline. The programs featured selective p300 and PRMT5 degraders. Data from the p300 degrader indicated profound anti-tumor activity in CBP mutant cancers, suggesting synthetic lethality. The research highlights the broad efficacy of their pipeline.

data.title: KB HOME OPENS MOONLIGHT AT LUNA PARK: A RARE OPPORTUNITY TO OWN A NEW HOME IN IRVINE, CALIFORNIA
data.description: A newly opened community in Irvine, California, offers resort-style amenities and proximity to top-rated schools and Orange County beaches. KB Home, a leading homebuilder on the NYSE as KBH, revealed the launch on April 17, 2026. This community presents an opportunity for interested individuals to tour the facilities and explore the available properties.

data.title: Hyperscale Data Declares Monthly Cash Dividend of $0.2708333 per Share of 13.00% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock
data.description: Hyperscale Data, Inc. (NYSE American: GPUS) has announced a monthly cash dividend of $0.20833 per share of its 10.00% Series E Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock. The dividend declaration was made by the company based in Las Vegas on April 17, 2026. Hyperscale Data is known for its expertise in artificial intelligence and operates as a data center company.

data.title: KB HOME OPENS THE CHARLES: NEW HOMES FROM THE MID $300Ks IN DESIRABLE CALDWELL, IDAHO
data.description: A recently opened community, The Charles, located in CALDWELL, Idaho, is now offering tours to potential residents. The community is within walking distance to local schools and boasts planned amenities. KB Home (NYSE: KBH), a renowned homebuilder in the U.S., announced the opening on April 17, 2026. The Charles presents a new-home opportunity for interested individuals in a prime location.

data.title: PTC Therapeutics Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In Warren, New Jersey, on April 17, 2026, PTC Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: PTCT) disclosed granting non-statutory stock options for the acquisition of 1,155 shares of common stock and 925 restricted stock units ("RSUs") on April 13, 2026.

data.title: Qualcomm Recommends Stockholders Reject Mini-Tender Offer by Tutanota LLC
data.description: In San Diego, Qualcomm Incorporated (Nasdaq: QCOM) has received notice of an unsolicited "mini-tender" proposal from Tutanota LLC to buy up to 500,000 shares, representing less than 0.05% of Qualcomm's total common stock, at $150.00 per share. The offer's price is contingent upon Qualcomm's common stock achieving a closing price above $150.00 per share on the final trading day before the offer concludes.

data.title: Cerebras Systems Announces Filing of Registration Statement for Proposed Initial Public Offering
data.description: A technology company based in Sunnyvale, California, Cerebras Systems Inc., has filed a registration statement on Form S-1 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for a planned initial public offering of its Class A common stock. The specific number of shares and the price range for the offering are currently undecided. This IPO is contingent upon market conditions, with no guaranteed completion at this time.

data.title: Naropa University Reduces Tuition & Expands Access Through New Academic Programs & Prior Learning Pathways
data.description: Naropa University in Boulder, Colorado, has announced a decrease in tuition fees for incoming students, with a commitment to maintaining current rates for existing students. The university also plans to enhance accessibility and flexibility by expanding prior learning credit options.

data.title: Across the Water with Tanielle Powell: Closer Than You Think TV Series Spotlights Jersey City Real Estate and Lifestyle on REAL Shows Network
data.description: The focus of a series hosted by Tanielle Powell is on showcasing the individuals, communities, and enterprises that embody Jersey City. This locally hosted program is presented by REAL Shows Network (RSN), a television network known for highlighting real estate and lifestyle narratives. The show, based in Jersey City, New Jersey, began airing on April 17, 2026, and aims to provide insights into the city's essence. Through this platform, a diverse range of people, neighborhoods, and businesses in Jersey City are being featured.

data.title: Lincoln Educational Services Corporation Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release And Conference Call
data.description: Parsippany-based Lincoln Educational Services Corporation (Nasdaq: LINC) disclosed plans for a conference call to review its Q1 financial performance on May 11, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. EST. Ahead of the call, scheduled an hour before at 9:30 a.m. EST, a press release highlighting Lincoln's results will be issued. Participants can join the conference call to gain insights into the company's financial standing and strategies going forward.

data.title: Mesa Royalty Trust Announces Trust Income for April 2026
data.description: The Mesa Royalty Trust (NYSE: MTR) revealed its income distribution for April 2026, with unitholders of record on April 30 set to receive $0.040259155 per unit on July 31. This distribution amount stems from the Trust's San Juan Basin properties in New Mexico, operated by Hilcorp San Juan LP, an affiliate of Hilcorp Energy Company, which contributed $96,591. Notably, no additional income was received by the Trust during April 2026.
